% Script generated by Brainstorm (17-Mar-2026)

% Input files
sFiles = {...
    'Subject01/Negative/timefreq_morlet_260413_1526_db.mat', ...
    'Subject02/Negative/timefreq_morlet_260413_1444_db.mat'};

% Start a new report
bst_report('Start', sFiles);

% Process: Extract values: [-200ms,800ms] 2-55Hz Oz, O1, Pz, P3, P4, F3, F4, FCz, FC1
sFiles = bst_process('CallProcess', 'process_extract_values', sFiles, [], ...
    'timewindow', [-0.2, 0.8], ...
    'freqrange',  [2, 55], ...
    'rows',       'Oz, O1, Pz, P3, P4, F3, F4, FCz, FC1', ...
    'isabs',      0, ...
    'avgtime',    0, ...
    'avgrow',     1, ...
    'avgfreq',    0, ...
    'matchrows',  1, ...
    'dim',        1, ...  % Concatenate signals (dimension 1)
    'Comment',    '');

% Save and display report
ReportFile = bst_report('Save', sFiles);
bst_report('Open', ReportFile);
